title: Throwability
description: adds throwable fire charges, buckets and a flare gun
body:
Throwability adds the ability to throw fire charges, as widely requested, as well as water and lava buckets! It's ideally vanilla plus, but is a little unbalanced and should be used with caution. Completely survival friendly, the crafting recipe is just the item (fire charge, water bucket or lava bucket) alone in a crafting table. Adds an enchantment for crossbows that can be crafted that allows you to shoot torches, exclusive with piercing and multishot.

Originally made as requested by my friend Cybdo.
